Opcode.name: PCM_OP_SUBSCRIPTION_CANCEL_SUBSCRIPTION
Opcode.Doc: PCM_OP_SUSBCRIPTION_CANCEL_SUBSCRIPTION input and output flist specifications. This opcode cancels a subscription service and all the member services.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Account object whose subscription is to be cancelled.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SUBSCRIPTION_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Service object for the subscription service to be cancelled.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_FLAGS
Int.Doc: If bill-now is to be run, this should be set to PIN_BILL_FLG_BILL_NOW 0x01

String.name: PIN_FLD_DESCR
String.Doc: Text to store in the audit event generated by the cancellation.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Timestamp of when the event started.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: Timestamp of when the event ended. This field is used to determine which billing cycle the event is part of.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the subscription object being cancelled.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
